row_scope: Gaussian q1 mu intercept n=5 smoke
allowed_hosts: Nibi or Rorqual only, with one primary host per run and Rorqual preferred as confirmation
substitutes_for: Reviewed Totoro/FIIA n=5 smoke gate while Totoro non-interactive SSH and fiia alias are unavailable
required_preconditions: Local n=2 dry-run passed; local n=5 rehearsal passed; all attempted rows retained; default_confint_wald_direct_sd_mu channel frozen; endpoint SD targets only; host root and git SHA recorded; Nibi n=5 substitute smoke imported and Fisher/Rose reviewed as no-promotion host smoke
required_artifacts: Raw replicate TSVs; per-cell summary TSV; seed manifest; sessionInfo.txt; git-sha.txt; module-list.txt; scheduler stdout/stderr if submitted through SLURM; exact command line
denominator_policy: All attempted rows retained; fit, convergence, pdHess, confint, finite interval, warning, and one-sided miss rows retained; n=5 is smoke evidence, not coverage evidence
blocked_uses: DRAC denominator grids; q1 sigma; q1 mu+sigma; q2; q4/q8; non-Gaussian; REML; AI-REML; supported or inference_ready claims
claim_boundary: Q-Series smoke-substitution contract only; this promotes exactly no Q-Series row and does not claim interval_status, coverage_status, inference_ready, supported, q4/q8, non-Gaussian, REML, AI-REML, bridge support, DRAC denominator evidence, or public support.
next_gate: Fisher/Rose reviewed the Nibi substitute-host n=5 smoke as host/fixture evidence only; next gate is a row-specific retained-denominator design that names interval channel, MCSE target, one-sided misses, blocked neighbours, host, seeds, artifact retention, and stop rules; no Nibi/Rorqual/DRAC denominator work, interval_status, coverage_status, inference_ready, supported, or public-support promotion before that design is reviewed; linked support cells remain point_fit/planned/planned under structured-re-q-series-smoke-substitution-contract.tsv.
